description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI for general build that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-18.04, windows-latest, and macos-latest. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python 3.x, configure the build with cmake based on the operating system, build the project, run tests with ctest, create a package with cpack, and test and build a Python package with setup.py.
